top_signals.title: Nasdaq tumbles 4% as shares in chip and memory groups sink
top_signals.summary: Rising expectations of a Federal Reserve rate increase send US bond yields rising sharply
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: DoubleLine, Oaktree Brace for Potential AI Pain
top_signals.summary: Credit heavyweights like DoubleLine Capital LP and Oaktree Capital Management are buying debt now that can perform well if the artificial intelligence boom turns into a credit bust.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
